name: meitheal
description: Meitheal — Cooperative task and life management engine for Home Assistant

tools.name: createTask
tools.description: Create a new task with title, description, priority, labels, and due date

tools.name: searchTasks
tools.description: Search tasks by keyword, status, or priority

tools.name: completeTask
tools.description: Mark a task as done by ID or title

tools.name: updateTask
tools.description: Update task fields (title, status, priority, due_date, description)

tools.name: getTask
tools.description: Get full details of a specific task by ID

tools.name: getCalendarEvents
tools.description: Get events from HA calendar synced into Meitheal

tools.name: getUpcoming
tools.description: Get all upcoming tasks and calendar events combined

tools.name: syncCalendar
tools.description: Trigger a manual calendar sync from Home Assistant

tools.name: getOverdueTasks
tools.description: Get all overdue tasks past their due date

tools.name: getTodaysTasks
tools.description: Get tasks due today plus any overdue tasks

tools.name: getTaskSummary
tools.description: Get summary counts: total, active, overdue, done

tools.name: batchComplete
tools.description: Complete multiple tasks at once by label or priority filter

tools.name: assignTask
tools.description: Assign a task to a HA or custom user

tools.name: listUsers
tools.description: List all available users (HA auto-discovered + custom)

tools.name: linkTask
tools.description: Create a Jira-style link between two tasks (related_to, blocked_by, blocks, duplicates, duplicated_by)

tools.name: unlinkTask
tools.description: Remove a link between two tasks by link ID

tools.name: getTaskLinks
tools.description: Get all outbound and inbound links for a task

authentication.note: Authentication handled by Home Assistant Supervisor ingress
